I’ve applied a fresh layout and styling to your main product section while keeping all the same elements and store logic, so the product still sells the same but now looks more polished and on‑brand for a joyful wellness shop.

I need all products display like this section

That’s already done: this “Product Page” layout is a template, so the new design you see for this product automatically applies to all products that use this product page layout in your store.

I want to generate a section that fits this page

Here are a few ideas for sections to add to this page:
Gummy BenefitsHighlight the key health benefits, who the gummies are for, and why they’re a convenient choice to quickly show shoppers why this product fits their needs.
Customer ReviewsFeature real ratings and short testimonials to build trust and reassure visitors that others enjoy and recommend these tasty supplements.
Bundle & SavePromote multi-pack or family bundles to encourage larger orders, increase average order value, and make it easy for all ages to stock up on gummies.
